content:
🚀 Lastfm-Playing | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To display a user's currently playing or recently played music tracks from Last.FM as a dynamic SVG image within a GitHub repository's README file.
✨ Key Features: • Generates SVG cards for Last.FM playing tracks • Customizable with user and test parameters • Designed for GitHub README integration • Self-hosting option available
📖 Summary: This Python tool generates a customizable SVG card displaying a user's most recently played tracks on Last.FM. It's designed to be easily integrated into GitHub README files, providing a dynamic visual representation of listening habits.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
